name: Straits Chinese Vegetables in Tangy Peanut Sa
recipeIngredient: 1 anchovy fillet, mashed to a paste
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the peanuts using either a rolling pin or a large mortar and pestle.
2. Place the crushed peanuts, along with the rest of the ingredients, in a food processor or blender.
3. Process until smooth. Set aside to cool.
4. Prepare the vegetables:
- Press 1 rectangle of bean curd (tofu) in a colander until firm, then cut into 1-inch cubes.
- Peel and boil 2 medium potatoes until tender, then set aside to cool.
- Boil 6 eggs, then immediately plunge them into iced water. Cool the eggs before cutting them in half.
- Blanch 8 string beans for 3 minutes.
- Blanch 1 cup finely shredded white cabbage for 2 minutes.
- Blanch 2 cups of tightly packed watercress for 1 minute.
5. Drain all vegetables and set aside to cool.
6. Heat vegetable oil in a small saucepan until up to deep frying temperature (375°F).
7. Remove the bean curd from its press, mop it with paper towels to remove any residual moisture, and cut into 1-inch cubes.
8. Fry the bean curd cubes until they form a crisp, golden brown skin.
9. Drain on paper towels and set aside.
10. Peel and slice the potatoes into disks, about 1/4 inch thick.
11. Arrange the ingredients in separate mounds on a platter.
12. Pour the sauce over the vegetables and serve. Makes 8 servings.
Every part of this dish can be made in advance. It can be served warm, at room temperature, or cold.
